title: Materialized state snapshot (training-data-plan.md §3, §3.2)
description: A periodic materialization so exporters don't replay every event. Carries the THREE state layers, never conflated: latent (oracle-only, evaluator-visible), observed, belief. state_hash is the Replay-test anchor — recomputing the fold from events up to at_sequence must reproduce it. This is a derived DOCUMENT (not an event); it does not carry the event envelope.

at_sequence.description: Snapshot reflects all events with sequence <= at_sequence.

latent_ground_truth_ref.description: null on non-oracle targets; evaluator-only, never exported to the acting model (§3.2).

observed_state.description: Facts backed by direct observation / deterministic instrumentation.

state_hash.description: Canonical hash of {observed_state, belief_state} — the Replay/Correction anchor.
